topic: Cell A cobot C33 calibration flash checksum failed

messages.text: cobot won't come up, C33 on the pendant

C33 is calibration flash checksum failed - the controller can't validate calibration data in flash. check the power connection between the power supply and Safety Control Board, and that the flash card matches the robot
power connector to the safety board was loose after the panel work yesterday
reseat it and reboot. if checksum still fails the flash card may be corrupt and you'll need to log a case with Universal Robots - don't bypass safety, escalate
reseated, rebooted, C33 cleared and calibration validated
